title: Why Is Incyte (INCY) Down 0.7% Since Last Earnings Report?
text: Incyte (INCY) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: Incyte Corporation (INCY) Q2 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Incyte Corporation (NASDAQ:INCY ) Q2 2023 Earnings Call Transcript July 31, 2023 8:00 AM ET Company Participants Greg Shertzer - Investor Relations Herve Hoppenot - President and Chief Executive Officer Pablo Cagnoni - President, Head of Research & Development Barry Flannelly - Executive Vice President and General Manager, North America Steven Stein - Executive Vice President and Chief Medical Officer Christiana Stamoulis - Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Kripa Devarakonda - Truist Allison Bratzel - Piper Sandler Vikram Purohit - Morgan Stanley Salveen Richter - Goldman Sachs Conor MacKay - BMO Capital Markets Jay Olson - Oppenheimer Eva Privitera - TD Cowen Kelsey Goodwin - Guggenheim Securities David Lebowitz - Citigroup Srdan Verstovsek - Wells Fargo Reni Benjamin - JMP Securities Operator Hello and welcome to the Incyte Second Quarter Earnings Conference Call and Webcast. [Operator Instructions] As a reminder, this conference is being recorded.

title: Compared to Estimates, Incyte (INCY) Q2 Earnings: A Look at Key Metrics
text: Although the revenue and EPS for Incyte (INCY) give a sense of how its business performed in the quarter ended June 2023, it might be worth considering how some key metrics compare with Wall Street estimates and the year-ago numbers.

title: Incyte (INCY) Beats on Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Incyte (INCY) reports impressive Q2 earnings on strong uptake in Jakafi and Opzelura sales. The company raises the bottom end of full-year guidance, setting a new range of $2.58-$2.63 billion.

title: Incyte (INCY) Beats Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Incyte (INCY) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.99 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.87 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.01 per share a year ago.

title: Incyte beats estimates on high demand for cancer drug Jakafi
text: Incyte Corp on Tuesday reported second-quarter profit and revenue above Wall Street estimates as demand for its blood cancer drug Jakafi and skin disorder drug Opzelura picked momentum.

title: Incyte Reports 2023 Second Quarter Financial Results and Provides Updates on Key Clinical Programs
text: WILMINGTON, Del.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $INCY--Incyte Reports 2023 Second Quarter Financial Results and Provides Updates on Key Clinical Programs.
